title: MisventureHD
description: "A modpack created for be simple and keeping a bit of vanilla escence but with a clean of face in terms of textures, animations and some other mecanic"
body:
**Public Release for the HermeteusDragon Spanish Serie "MisventureHD" Modpack (now free of BPA)**

🐲Purpose:
This modpack does not seek to be something complex in terms of mechanics or anything like that, it simply try to expand some points of the vanilla game and add things not very common seen
in others, or tell me, in how many modpacks with a friendly aesthetic are crypts of the
graveyard mod? Or be a magician who fights against hordes of zombies with beastly amounts
of health with a crimson moon in the background? You will surely find more than one, but I think none that can work well outside of theory better than this, or I don't know, you as a player will be the judge, I'm just the postman.

-Chrome
This modpack building for forge 1.19.2 was planned for run in low budget PC, but how are we talking about MCforge, so [there is a github page in case of problems :P](https://github.com/ChromeTV/MisventureHD/issues)


<details>
<summary>Disclaimer!</summary>
A few mods in the MP has been modificated for be more balanced to the ingame diffilcuty and acord to the wanted aesthetic.

Between the modifications are:

>-[Scalinghealth Mod:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/scaling-health)
>>1. Health Crystal, power Crystal and they respective Shards.
>>2. Changes in the Ores Textures.
>>3. Reduced difficulty scalling time to 0.010% for seconds.
>>4. Reduced XP necessary for get 1 hearth of live
>>5. Eliminated Experiencie for live mechanic.
>>6. Tweaks in the P.C. and H.C. Recipes.
>>7. Reduced ore spawn rate.
>>8. Changes in the IU textures.

>-[Weaping angels:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/weeping-angels-mod/comments)
>>1. Reduced Angels Spawn rate.
>>2. Removed Dimensional Teleport Mechanic.
>>3. Changes in the ore texture.

>-[Capybaras mod:](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/capybara-forge)
>>1. Small changes in the Capybaras texture.
>>2. Improved Capybaras animations.

Im not owned anyone of the mods tweaked, only this changes was made for enchance the gameplay experience, pls give the atention what deserve to the original autors :3.
</details>


<details>
<summary>Unlisted Metadata</summary>
<h5>Some mods here are not availed in modrinth or has been
modificated at moment to create this modpack,for terms of
tranparency i want to explain what mods are and the reason of their respective
Unlistening<h5>

>-[Seaborgium.](https://github.forge/com/undefinedbhvr/Seaborgium):                                                                                     

>>Reason: Deleted Original Mod pages, but necesary for ingame Render optimitation

>-[Scaling Health.](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/scaling-health)

>> Reason: Tweaked Original mod
</details>
